message:
feat(frankennode): add remediation backlog support bead linkage and contract formatting

Wire bd-3ar8v.7.16 remediation-backlog evidence into claim-gating and
mission contracts with fail-closed test coverage. Apply rustfmt to
FrankenNode contract test files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
